_doc: USDA FAS GAIN Uganda Coffee Annual — manually transcribed from UG2025-* (May 2025 release; the May 2026 release isn't yet captured by the live scraper because FAS Cloudflare-blocks GitHub Actions IPs with 403). Same seed-fallback mechanism as Brazil and Vietnam. Uganda exports are almost entirely green-bean — soluble/roast streams are negligible, so exports_mt ≈ bean_exports_mt.
source: USDA FAS GAIN UG2025-* (Uganda Coffee Annual, May 2025)
